race.comment: SILVASISTA (2) is a talented filly who jumped $3.6 last time out in the tougher Clare Lindop (Laelia) Stakes over 1600m at Morphettville, but disappointed (vet cleared). Settled too far back, a slow tempo against. Had been tracking well prior and went to Adelaide off a placing in a Caulfield Open 3. She has the blinkers on for the first time and should appreciate the step-up to a middle distance. MY UNCLE DID IT (1) raced close to the lead before clearing out to score an effortless 2.5 lengths win over 2206m at Ararat last time. Won by 4.5L from the front over this trip at Terang prior, and the in-form Meech sticks. Draws low and will give a big sight. AURORA RISE (4) raced well at Stakes level in Tasmania and then was heavily-backed over 2000m at Albury, and didn't have much luck beaten 3.5 lengths. Blinkers go on today, and she has had a tick-over trial. Keep onside. Ditto VIZIE (8), who maps well and has been within range without winning. CRACK A DEEL (6) is a likely improver.
